# Aztec FPC — Fee Payment Contracts

> FPC pays transaction gas on Aztec so users don't need Fee Juice.
> Users pay the operator in any token they hold. The operator keeps the spread.
> One contract, any number of tokens, no redeployment.

Project: https://github.com/NethermindEth/aztec-fpc
Docs site: https://nethermindeth.github.io/aztec-fpc
License: MIT
Maintainer: Nethermind

---

## If you are a human, start here

Pick your role, follow the path:

**dApp developer** — you want users to pay gas in your token
  1. Read the overview        → index.md
  2. Install the SDK          → sdk.md
  3. Wire up payments         → sdk.md#standard-flow
  4. Add cold-start if needed → how-to/cold-start-flow.md

**Wallet team** — you want to surface gas abstraction in your wallet UI
  1. Read the overview        → index.md
  2. Fetch discovery doc      → reference/wallet-discovery.md
  3. Integrate the SDK        → how-to/integrate-wallet.md
  4. Run your own operator    → how-to/run-operator.md

**Operator** — you want to deploy and run the full FPC stack
  1. Quick start (Docker)     → quick-start.md
  2. Deploy contracts         → operations/deployment.md
  3. Configure services       → operations/configuration.md
  4. Monitor with metrics     → reference/metrics.md

**Auditor / security researcher** — you want to understand trust and attack surface
  1. Security model           → security.md
  2. Quote system internals   → quote-system.md
  3. Contract source          → contracts.md
  4. E2E test matrix          → reference/e2e-test-matrix.md

---

## How FPC works (30-second version)

1. User's wallet calls the attestation service: "I want to pay gas with token X"
2. Attestation service returns a signed quote: "Y amount of token X covers Z Fee Juice"
3. User submits a transaction to the FPC contract with the signed quote
4. FPC contract verifies the Schnorr signature, transfers tokens from user to operator,
   pays Fee Juice to the protocol, and the user's app logic runs
5. The top-up service watches the FPC's Fee Juice balance and bridges more from L1

Two entry points:
- `fee_entrypoint` — user already has L2 tokens
- `cold_start_entrypoint` — user just bridged from L1, has no account or balance yet

---

## Documentation map

Below is every documentation page, what it covers, and who it is for.
Base URL for all docs: website/docs/

### Core (read these first)

  index.md
    What FPC is, component table, comparison with Sponsored FPC, quick code example,
    persona routing table. Start here.

  architecture.md
    Four-layer system design: contract, attestation service, top-up service, SDK.
    System diagram, data flows, interface map, operator key model.

  quote-system.md
    How fee quotes are constructed, signed (Schnorr over Poseidon2 hash), and verified
    on-chain. 7-field normal preimage, 9-field cold-start preimage, domain separators,
    exchange rate formula, TTL cap (3600s).

  security.md
    Trust assumptions, key management, secret provider modes, on-chain protections
    (replay via nullifier, user binding, freshness, domain separation), off-chain
    protections (admin auth, rate limiting), threat matrix, production checklist.

### SDK

  sdk.md
    Full SDK reference. FpcClient constructor, createPaymentMethod(), executeColdStart(),
    all input/output types, gas buffer values, cold-start retry logic, installation.
    Package: @nethermindeth/aztec-fpc-sdk

### Contracts

  contracts.md
    All Noir smart contracts. FPCMultiAsset (fee_entrypoint, cold_start_entrypoint,
    storage layout, quote verification, preimage fields), Faucet (drip, admin_drip),
    TokenBridge (claim_public, claim_private, exit_to_l1), dependency graph, build commands.

### Services

  services.md
    Attestation service: REST endpoints (GET /quote, GET /cold-start-quote,
    GET /.well-known/fpc.json, admin API), signing flow, auth modes, config keys.
    Top-up service: balance monitoring, L1 bridging, LMDB crash recovery, auto-claim,
    ops endpoints.

### How-to guides

  how-to/add-supported-asset.md
    Add or remove accepted tokens via the admin API. PUT/DELETE endpoints, pricing
    formula, configure-token batch mode.

  how-to/cold-start-flow.md
    End-to-end cold-start: L1 bridge deposit, SDK executeColdStart(), contract claim,
    fee payment, and token delivery in one atomic transaction.

  how-to/integrate-wallet.md
    Wallet integration: fetch discovery document, resolve operator, wire SDK into
    transaction flow, handle quote expiry.

  how-to/run-operator.md
    Full operator guide: deploy contract, configure attestation + top-up, set up
    monitoring, production hardening checklist.

### Operations

  operations/configuration.md
    All config keys for attestation and top-up services. YAML structure, env var
    overrides, runtime profiles (development/test/production), rate limiting,
    secret provider options.

  operations/deployment.md
    Contract deployment: Docker two-phase deploy, bun path, configure-token,
    manifest schema, verification, public-network compose.

  operations/docker.md
    Docker Buildx Bake targets, compose services (infra + full stack), CI pipeline,
    image names, port mappings, build commands.

  operations/testing.md
    Test layers: Noir contract tests, TS service/SDK unit tests, 7 Docker integration
    suites, profiling benchmarks, smoke tests.

### Reference

  reference/glossary.md
    All FPC-specific terms: domain separators, quote preimage fields, contract
    functions, SDK types, operator concepts.

  reference/metrics.md
    Every Prometheus metric emitted by attestation and top-up services. Metric names,
    types, labels, and values traced to source file and line number.

  reference/e2e-test-matrix.md
    Six negative test scenarios (replay, expiry, TTL, sender binding, phase enforcement,
    insufficient Fee Juice) plus happy path and cold-start suites.

  reference/testnet-deployment.md
    All testnet addresses and URLs traced to deployments/testnet/manifest.json with
    exact JSON paths. Operator public key, network metadata, verification commands.

  reference/wallet-discovery.md
    GET /.well-known/fpc.json schema, required fields, resolution order, supported
    asset format, operator address absence by design.

  quick-start.md
    Docker Compose one-command setup, manual bun bring-up, SDK smoke test,
    verify commands.

---

## Source code map

For AI agents navigating the codebase, here is where the key source files live:

### Contracts (Noir)
  contracts/fpc/src/main.nr              — FPCMultiAsset contract (fee_entrypoint, cold_start_entrypoint)
  contracts/fpc/src/test/fee_entrypoint.nr       — 7 contract tests for fee_entrypoint
  contracts/fpc/src/test/cold_start_entrypoint.nr — 4 contract tests for cold_start_entrypoint
  contracts/fpc/src/test/utils.nr                 — Test helpers, domain separators
  contracts/faucet/src/main.nr           — Faucet contract (drip, admin_drip)
  contracts/token_bridge/src/main.nr     — TokenBridge contract (claim_public, claim_private)
  contracts/noop/src/main.nr             — Noop contract (profiling baseline)

### Attestation service (TypeScript)
  services/attestation/src/server.ts     — Fastify HTTP server, all REST endpoints
  services/attestation/src/config.ts     — Config schema, Zod validation, env overrides
  services/attestation/src/signer.ts     — Schnorr signing, computeInnerAuthWitHash
  services/attestation/src/metrics.ts    — Prometheus metric definitions
  services/attestation/src/request-schemas.ts  — Request validation schemas
  services/attestation/src/asset-policy-store.ts — LMDB asset policy persistence
  services/attestation/src/operator-treasury.ts  — Sweep and balance operations
  services/attestation/src/secret-provider.ts    — Secret resolution (env/config/kms/hsm)

### Top-up service (TypeScript)
  services/topup/src/index.ts            — Main loop, reconciliation, auto-claim toggle
  services/topup/src/checker.ts          — Balance check and bridge trigger logic
  services/topup/src/bridge.ts           — L1FeeJuicePortalManager bridge calls
  services/topup/src/confirm.ts          — L1-to-L2 confirmation (message + balance-delta)
  services/topup/src/state.ts            — LMDB bridge state persistence
  services/topup/src/reconcile.ts        — Stale bridge eviction (24h)
  services/topup/src/autoclaim.ts        — Auto-claim logic and key resolution
  services/topup/src/config.ts           — Config schema and env overrides
  services/topup/src/ops.ts              — Health, readiness, metrics endpoints
  services/topup/src/monitor.ts          — Fee Juice balance reader
  services/topup/src/l1.ts               — L1 chain ID validation

### SDK (TypeScript)
  sdk/src/index.ts                       — Public exports (FpcClient)
  sdk/src/payment-method.ts              — createPaymentMethod(), executeColdStart()
  sdk/src/types.ts                       — FpcClientConfig, all input/output types

### Deployment
  contract-deployment/src/index.ts       — CLI deploy orchestrator
  contract-deployment/src/manifest.ts    — Manifest schema and writer
  contract-deployment/src/verify.ts      — On-chain deployment verification

### Config and infrastructure
  deployments/testnet/manifest.json      — Testnet deployment addresses (source of truth)
  deployments/testnet/fpc-config.yaml    — Testnet master config
  deployments/testnet/attestation/config.yaml — Testnet attestation config
  deployments/testnet/topup/config.yaml  — Testnet top-up config
  docker-bake.hcl                        — Docker Buildx Bake targets
  docker-compose.yaml                    — Local dev compose (infra + full stack)
  docker-compose.public.yaml             — Public network compose (testnet/devnet)

### Tests
  scripts/tests/services.ts              — Service health and API tests
  scripts/tests/cold-start.ts            — Cold-start integration test
  scripts/tests/cold-start-validation.ts — Cold-start negative scenarios
  scripts/tests/fee-entrypoint-validation.ts — fee_entrypoint negative scenarios
  scripts/tests/concurrent.ts            — Concurrent transaction stress test
  scripts/tests/same-token-transfer.ts   — Same-token transfer flow
  scripts/tests/always-revert.ts         — Revert behavior validation

---

## Key technical facts (for quick agent reference)

Contract: FPCMultiAsset
  Storage: PublicImmutable<Config> with operator, operator_pubkey_x, operator_pubkey_y
  Key rotation: requires redeployment (PublicImmutable cannot be updated)
  Asset allowlist: none (quote signature binds the asset)

Quote signing:
  Hash function: computeInnerAuthWitHash (Poseidon2 internally)
  Normal preimage (7 fields): [0x465043, fpc_address, accepted_asset, fj_fee_amount,
    aa_payment_amount, valid_until, user_address]
  Cold-start preimage (9 fields): [0x46504373, fpc_address, accepted_asset,
    fj_fee_amount, aa_payment_amount, valid_until, user_address,
    claim_amount, claim_secret_hash]
  Signature: Schnorr on Grumpkin curve, 64 bytes, hex-encoded, 0x-prefixed
  Replay protection: nullifier pushed per quote hash
  On-chain TTL cap: 3600 seconds (MAX_QUOTE_TTL_SECONDS)

Exchange rate formula:
  rate_num = market_rate_num * (10000 + fee_bips)
  rate_den = market_rate_den * 10000
  aa_payment_amount = ceil(fj_amount * rate_num / rate_den)

Attestation REST API:
  GET  /health                           — liveness probe
  GET  /metrics                          — Prometheus metrics
  GET  /.well-known/fpc.json             — wallet discovery document
  GET  /accepted-assets                  — list configured tokens
  GET  /quote?user=&accepted_asset=&fj_amount=  — request signed quote
  GET  /cold-start-quote?...&claim_amount=&claim_secret_hash=  — cold-start quote
  GET  /admin/asset-policies             — list all policies (admin)
  PUT  /admin/asset-policies/:assetAddress  — upsert policy (admin)
  DELETE /admin/asset-policies/:assetAddress — remove policy (admin)
  GET  /admin/operator-balances          — token balances (admin)
  POST /admin/sweeps                     — sweep tokens to destination (admin)

Top-up ops API (default port 3001):
  GET  /health                           — liveness probe
  GET  /ready                            — readiness (200 or 503)
  GET  /metrics                          — Prometheus metrics

SDK surface:
  new FpcClient({ fpcAddress, operator, node, attestationBaseUrl })
  client.createPaymentMethod({ wallet, user, tokenAddress, estimatedGas })
  client.executeColdStart({ wallet, userAddress, tokenAddress, bridgeAddress, bridgeClaim })

Versions:
  Aztec: 4.2.0-aztecnr-rc.2
  Bun: 1.3.11
